  • Uses of Widget in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core

    Methods in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core that return Widget
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Widget
    Component.bottom(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-center point lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.bottomLeft(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-left corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.bottomRight(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose bottom-right corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.center()
    Returns a widget containing this component centered at the center of the screen.
    Widget
    Component.center(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component centered at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.getWidget()
    Returns the widget that contains this component.
    Widget
    Widget.hide()
    Hides this widget.
    Widget
    Component.left(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose middle-left point lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.right(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose middle-right point lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Widget.setLayerIndex(int layerIndex)
    Sets the layer index of this widget, which dictates which widget is rendered on top and receives the input events first.
    Widget
    Widget.setVisible(boolean visible)
    Sets the visibility of this widget.
    Widget
    Widget.show()
    Shows this widget.
    Widget
    Component.top(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose top-center point lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.topLeft(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose top-left corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Widget
    Component.topRight(int x, int y)
    Returns a widget containing this component whose top-right corner lies at the given coordinates.
    Methods in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core that return types with arguments of type Widget
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Widget>
    Component.getChildWidgets()
    Returns the list of child widgets of this component.
    List<Widget>
    GUI.getWidgets()
    Returns the list of widgets contained in this GUI.
    Methods in io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core with parameters of type Widget
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Component.addWidget(Widget widget)
    Adds the given widget as a child widget of this component.
    void
    GUI.addWidget(Widget widget)
    Adds the given widget to this GUI.
    void
    GUI.disableInput(Widget exception)
    Disables input events for every widget in this GUI, with an exception.

    AnchorParameter.getWidget(Component component, int x, int y)
